reason: Verify the injection stays phase-scoped to collecting_params and that dynamic_prompt remains the sole per-turn context authority (D4-MW) -- no context leaked into rehydrate or tools. Check from_user carry fields match the documented draft shape.

Verify the change touches only the prompt middleware, not reception_node dispatch / subgraph topology. Confirm the CC mirror is justified by the documented TLC->CC sequence vision, not speculative scope creep (Rule 2).
Verify the prior-step resolver uses the read-only ctx accessors (ctx.trials / ctx.latest_trial) and does not mutate the frozen SessionContext.

Check implementation against acceptance criteria (prompt contains prior solvent_ratio for chained CC->RE; no block + exit-B preserved for standalone; symmetric CC coverage) and that out-of-scope (no merge engine, no hard-inherit, no FE change) is respected.
